title: Workspace Templates as Apps
excerpt: Hello, I am looking for clarity on apps built on Workspace Templates. We are building app based on industry verticals. We plan on using pre-built workspaces as the app to be used for monetization.  Its not clear to me th…

posts.author: JWILZCPA (Jeff Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am looking for clarity on apps built on Workspace Templates. We are building app based on industry verticals. We plan on using pre-built workspaces as the app to be used for monetization. Its not clear to me though, if our “workspace” templates would be open to any user besides our app users if we make them templates… It reads as though we me look to monetize via app, they could also be used as free templates. Is that correct???

“Users will be able to find your template within the category that you listed above in the feature details. From there they can add the template to their account just like they would have done previously with any pre-built templates provided by monday.com.”

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @JWILZCPA,

If your app has workspace templates in it, your workspace templates will only be available for accounts that install your app. People who did not install your app will not be able to see or use these templates.

Let me know if you have any questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: JWILZCPA (Jeff Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Matias:

who did not install your app will not be able to see or use these templates.

Let me know if you have any questions!

Is it a best practice to use an black or sandbox , Monday account to build on?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

Yes, you can for sure create a new “dummy” account for testing.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Miguel1 (Miguel)
posts.cookedHtml: Another question about this, what about the security for the workspace template? Can we shut down to app if they are not paying?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: 99% sure there is no way to do that. Checking here Slack with Alon Schatz

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Miguel1 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, there is no way of blocking an account that stops paying from using a workspace template feature.

You can request this feature here
